operations.description: Delete a secret and all its versions

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: Secret version. If not set, the latest version will be returned

parameters.name: cas
parameters.description: Current secret version number. When the “cas” (Check and set) is specified, the current version of the secret is verified before updating it. In order for a write to be successful,“cas” must be set to the current version of the secret.

operations.description: List the versions of a secret

parameters.name: cas
parameters.description: Current secret version number. When the “cas” (Check and set) is specified, the current version of the secret is verified before updating it. In order for a write to be successful,“cas” must be set to the current version of the secret.

iamActions.description: Required to deactivate a secret version
